source_description: Go-live blockers: production launch readiness - public landing page for signed-out visitors, privacy policy and terms pages, Google OAuth consent screen publishing prerequisites, and production environment provisioning (domain, prod API + managed Mongo, frontend pointing at prod) captured as a runbook
